# ui.pages.landbirds_v4 { #app.ui.pages.landbirds_v4 }

`ui.pages.landbirds_v4`

Landbirds Version 4 historical model placeholder view template.

Acts as a structural interface mirror for legacy metrics, providing the 
front-end layout panels for future backend server wiring sprints.

Currently linking back to old website.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [landbirds_v4_tab](#app.ui.pages.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab) | Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the landbird v4 model results. |

### landbirds_v4_tab { #app.ui.pages.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab }

```python
ui.pages.landbirds_v4.landbirds_v4_tab()
```

Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the landbird v4 model results.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                                  |
|--------|----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.nav_control | A navigation controller containing an external anchor element configuration. |
